content.summary: Particle simulation using position and velocity integration with external forces. Applies gravity, velocity damping, and Euler integration to update point positions each frame. A foundation for physics-based particle systems.
warnings: Requires input SOP with both position (P) and velocity (v) attributes
uDeltaTime should be connected to a frame-rate-independent time source

uniforms.description: Velocity damping factor (0-1, lower = more drag)
uniforms.name: uDamping
